ksa_text: Conduct fundamental rights impact assessments for AI systems, including rights identification, disproportionate impact analysis, and integration of assessment findings into deployment decisions.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain AI Governance KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.0) to justify inclusion for the VP Data Science. Without stronger framework alignment, this task KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain task KSA be expected in real-world VP Data Science roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm AI Governance is not a standard competency expectation for VP Data Science. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the VP Data Science competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.0) and edge-domain placement (AI Governance) do not meet inclusion threshold for the VP Data Science. All passes support exclusion.
